_readme: MCP bootstrap for this project's `req` server. Agents reading this should treat req as the managed surface for editing project.req. See `req help mcp` and `req help agents` for triggers.

req.description: Managed requirements for this project. Tools: req_list, req_show, req_add, req_update, req_delete, req_link, req_validate, req_coverage, req_export, req_help. Call req_help with {section: 'agents'} on first contact for the trigger table.
